name: Fukoku Co. Ltd.
message: In 2022, Fukoku Co., Ltd. celebrates its 90th anniversary.Since our founder, Shinkichi Koga, began manufacturing and selling futons in Yanagawa City, Fukuoka Prefecture, Fukoku has consistently been of service to our customers through "textiles."Today, we enjoy patronage from a wide range of industries, from futons (bedding) to the automotive, housing, and nursing care fields, but all of this is a business that derives from the "textile = thread" that we have known since our founding.In 2009, we created a new brand logo,which is "CCC Chasic."• Date bases. accounting. sales. purchasing. drawings. prototypes. production cycles. https://fukoku-jp.com/
